title: STLIAN Silicone Coasters with Holder,[6 Pack] Drinking Coasters - Cup Mat for Hot or Cold Drinks, Thickened, Non-Slip, Non-stick,Deep Tray Olive Green

Smart protect the surface of your kitchen counter tabletop, office desk or bedside furniture from nasty marks or scary scratch

MUTI USE & OFFERS: Those versatile drinking coasters can be used as small trivet, pot holder, spoon rest, kitchen table pad, even the furniture feet floor cup for chairs and tables at home , also will be a professional bartender supplies, barware tabletop set, bar absorbing mat at bar.
